case.prediction_format: Return ranked root causes as objects with `time` as Unix seconds, `component` as a candidate root cause service, and `reason` as a candidate root cause metric.

reasoner.analysis: Checked 1260-1440s currencyservice. Latency.p50 dev=+192 to +269 confirms sustained anomaly. Mem dev=+10 to +12 is secondary. Traces show high self latency (36-45ms). Root cause is currencyservice latency.
Final RCA confirms currencyservice latency (dev=+107 to +269) as primary cause. Frontend and checkoutservice show secondary latency propagation. Metrics validate root cause over traces.
